description: Style Note You don’t need to go overboard on bling to standout. This casual bag from baggit could easily do the trick. The unique design of this bag gives it an edgy look and it has enough space inside to accommodate your items. So, all you women out there who need to store all your important cards, papers and carry currency notes securely, here’s the best bet. Product Details Brown purse crafted in synthectic shimmer fabric Pleated design on the flap with magnetic press button flap closure One main compartment with three interior slots and one zippered pocket Branding on the back and one zippered pocket Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 13 cm Width: 25 cm
